name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine, shortening, brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, corn syrup, water, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and salt to the creamed mixture. Mix until just combined.
3. Stir in the oats and raisins.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
6. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the sheet before transferring them to cooling racks.
